company.name_jp: 株式会社エスエフシー新潟

research_notes: Website (https://www.sfc-niigata.co.jp/) has encoding issues (Shift-JIS not properly decoded), making content extraction unreliable. From partial decode: company name is 株式会社エスエフシー新潟, established Showa 54 (1979), capital 8,000万円, based in Niigata with 9 branch offices nationwide (Niigata HQ, Tokyo, Sendai, Utsunomiya, Osaka, Nagoya, Hiroshima, Fukuoka). Software development company focused on hospital/care, shift management, nutrition management, and bathing facility software. JIS Q 27001 (ISO/IEC 27001) certified. Executive names could not be extracted due to encoding issues.
